mc.priors: regime-consistent conversion-opt delivery (observed Bukti IC-opt Jul 9-10: CPM 119-235k, CTR 341/3075, atc|click 70/341, ic|atc 47/70) x purchase_given_ic [0,57] (57 observed InitiateCheckout events Jul 8-15 -> ZERO paid orders) x AOV [174k,621k] from DB last-paid rows
mc.lever_that_must_improve: purchase_given_ic. 57 observed IC -> 0 purchases is now the dominant blocking term; no funnel GRAMMAR (F7 included) can clear 2.0 while IC->Purchase reads 0/57. The unlock is the checkout/payment step, NOT a new funnel angle.
mc.min_evidence_lock: FORCED REJECT (0 attributed paid orders, need >=3) — fired independently of the math.
mc.integrity_note: First param draft for F7 mixed regimes (cheap-book CPM 4k paired with conversion-opt conversion rates) and flattered p_target to 0.5376. That combination is unobservable — cheap LINK_CLICKS delivery does not produce conversion-opt funnel rates. Re-run with regime-consistent priors -> 0.0415. The min-evidence lock forced REJECT on BOTH drafts, i.e. it caught exactly the priors-gaming it exists to catch. Recorded verdict = the honest one.

revenue_goal.directive: Hans in-session 2026-07-19: 'Lets high aim for 1 Billion / Month' (raised from Nett 200jt/month same day). Loop = various sales funnels production live-ready, ever-increasing monthly revenue.

north_star.nett_definition: revenue - COGS (state/cogs_canon.json) - ad spend - shipping subsidy
north_star.implied_revenue_at_blended_margin: ~1.5-1.8B revenue/month at ~75% blended gross margin with disciplined ad spend (~55-60jt/day revenue run-rate)
north_star.honesty_note: North star is ~380x the current 30d cart value (Rp3.1jt) - the loop reports ONLY against the current milestone, never claims progress toward the north star without DB-attributed paid orders.

baseline_ground_truth_2026-07-19.first_organic_paid_since_cliff: cmrptwn8y0001l704v63f10tk (Wildan Akbar, PAID 2026-07-18 03:51Z, Rp86.070, raw food, paid 60s after checkout)
baseline_ground_truth_2026-07-19.discrepancy_flag: Hans states ATC value ~ Rp200jt/month. DB cart value is Rp3.1jt/30d. If the 200jt figure is from Meta pixel AddToCart value, it is inconsistent with the DB by ~65x and must be reconciled (pixel dedup/currency/test-events) before any spend decision uses it. The loop treats DB as ground truth (instrument canon) and the 200jt as the TARGET, not the current state.

rules.head: While ROAS gate is closed and envelope has room, reactivate lowest-CPM/CPC traffic engines (TikTok 120232267765710694, Affiliate 120235584621130694, Sales-Funnel 120234996651390694
For a live ad set past the min-data guard: propose +20% budget if CPC <= 45 and CTR >= 10% on a fresh 3-day window (max 3 scale steps/7d); propose -20% or pause if CPC > 200 or CTR
If frequency (7d) > 2.0 (Shopee Traffic/Conversions already ~2.3), propose audience expansion or creative refresh BEFORE any budget cut — fatigue is a creative/audience problem, no
If anomaly_signal reports auction overlap among the 7 channel-segmented ad sets, propose consolidation rather than further fragmentation.
STANDING P1: instrument Purchase/AddToCart/InitiateCheckout/ViewContent (value+currency=IDR+content_ids) on ourdailypets.com via Next.js+Midtrans webhook + stand up CAPI + verify d
Total proposed daily spend stays inside IDR 150k-500k (zero-sum reallocation until ROAS justifies expansion)
Did creatives generated from a mined Meta-Library pattern beat the incumbent CONTROL on the LEGAL metric (CTR/CPC, two-proportion significance test, Benjamini-Hochberg corrected, o
Does the Higgsfield virality_predictor score rank-correlate with realized CTR-vs-control (Spearman, out-of-sample, >=30 pairs)? virality_predictor is a NON-GATING triage filter and
GATE, runs before every cycle: Layer-3 commerce truth (order-health probe: carts->midtrans_token->paid + guest-checkout flag + Purchase dataset-vs-DB agreement) must be GREEN befor
When platform proxies (events, CTR, opportunity_score) and business ground truth (paid orders in the live DB) diverge, GROUND TRUTH WINS and the divergence direction IS the diagnos
When a later run disproves an earlier diagnosis, write a superseding ledger entry that names the corrected entry, states the wrong reasoning AND the disproving evidence, and update
